title: Add day-of-week aware social posting with platform-specific optimal time windows
description: Add platform-specific posting schedule awareness to the social pipeline. Research shows strong day-of-week and time-of-day effects on engagement: Bluesky threads get 3x engagement Tue/Wed/Thu 9-11 AM vs other times; LinkedIn posts decided in the first 90 minutes perform best Tue-Thu 8-10 AM. Currently the pipeline runs at 7 AM daily and posts immediately after approval regardless of day or time. This feature adds a schedule-aware posting layer: (1) EIC considers day-of-week when scoring topics (lower bar on strong days, skip on weak days like Saturday), (2) approved posts can be deferred to the optimal window for each platform, (3) day-of-week skip logic prevents posting on low-engagement days unless the topic scores exceptionally high. The pipeline already has posting window awareness (pipeline.py line 486) but ignores it.
requirements: Add posting_schedule to social-config.json with per-platform optimal windows (day_of_week, start_hour, end_hour in user timezone)
Add should_post_today() function to social/pipeline.py that checks day-of-week against schedule
Add optimal_post_time() function that returns the next optimal window for a given platform
Modify EIC topic scoring to weight day-of-week engagement potential (pass schedule context to EIC prompt)
When pipeline runs before optimal window, defer posting via a scheduled file that a lightweight poster script picks up
Add deferred_posts table to memory.db for posts awaiting their optimal window
Add poster daemon or launchd job that checks deferred_posts and publishes at scheduled times
Log scheduling decisions at INFO level (posted immediately vs deferred to HH:MM)
done_criteria: Posts on Tuesday-Thursday go out at platform-optimal times (Bluesky 9-10 AM, LinkedIn 8-10 AM)
Posts on Friday/Saturday are deferred or skipped unless topic score exceeds high threshold
EIC prompt includes day-of-week context and adjusts topic selection accordingly
Deferred posts table tracks pending posts with scheduled_at timestamps
New tests verify should_post_today() returns correct values for each day
New test verifies optimal_post_time() calculates correct defer window

design_spec.architecture_impact: Adds scheduling layer between approval and posting. Requires either a lightweight poster daemon (launchd job) or integration with existing pipeline scheduling. Adds one table to memory.db. Modifies EIC prompt to include day context.

context: Research from https://blog.bskygrowth.com/bluesky-algorithm-2026-how-to-get-more-reach/ and https://postiv.ai/blog/linkedin-content-strategy-2025 shows clear engagement patterns by day and time. Bluesky has no hidden algorithm so reach is proportional to network engagement — threads on Tue/Wed/Thu 9-11 AM get 3x engagement. LinkedIn's 360Brew algorithm decides post fate in the first 90 minutes — Tue-Thu 8-10 AM is optimal. MindPattern currently posts immediately after 7 AM pipeline approval, missing the peak engagement windows by 1-3 hours.

feedback_history.reason: Codex adversarial: 5 files + new launchd daemon + modifies social-config.json (do not commit); too many moving parts for 25 turns
